doganNote.ahilikText: Ahilism is a medieval Turkish artisan philosophy. Javanmardlik, SİMAT (honesty, quality, ethics), and the master-apprentice relationship are its foundation. DK Agency brings these values to the HoReCa sector.
doganNote.bio: Dogan Tomris is a HoReCa consultant with experience in restaurant operations, food cost management, and digital transformation. He founded DK Agency to support Azerbaijani entrepreneurs with digital tools and AI.
doganNote.socialProof: The first AI-powered platform for HoReCa in Baku
